description: Working as a Senior Software Engineer, responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining scalable web and mobile applications for enterprise telecom solutions. Building modern frontend applications using Next.js, React.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, while developing cross-platform mobile applications with React Native, Redux, and RTK Query. Collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software, integrating GraphQL APIs using Apollo Client, conducting code reviews, optimizing application performance, and ensuring best practices in software architecture, testing, and development.
achievements: Build Web Application using Next Js, React Js, Typescript and Tailwind CSS.
Build iOS and Android apps using React Native, Redux and RTK Query and TypeScript.
This includes designing, developing, and testing user interfaces, as well as integrating with native APIs.
Use Apollo GraphQL for gql APIs. This involves creating and maintaining GraphQL queries and mutations, as well as working with the Apollo client library.
Fix bugs. This includes identifying and debugging issues in existing code, as well as writing unit tests to prevent future bugs.
Do code reviews of peer code. This involves providing feedback on the code quality and readability of other developers' code.

description: Led the development, modernization, and delivery of enterprise-scale web and mobile applications for the Successware platform. Collaborated with stakeholders, managed development teams, and built scalable solutions for service-oriented businesses using React, React Native, TypeScript, and Node.js.
achievements: Improved web and mobile application performance, reducing page load times by over 60%
Led development of Successware web and mobile applications for booking, dispatching, and field service operations
Served as the primary point of contact between development teams and clients/stakeholders
Managed project resources, timelines, and budgets, improving delivery efficiency by 20%
Mentored and supervised a team of 5 developers, promoting collaboration and productivity
Upgraded React, React Native, TypeScript, Node.js, React-DnD, and Ant Design to the latest versions
Participated in architecture design and strategic technical discussions with cross-functional teams
Established and maintained high code quality standards through reviews and best practices
Developed and maintained cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android using React Native
Built scalable and reusable components for enterprise-level web and mobile solutions

description: Developed and maintained web, mobile, and AI-powered legal technology solutions focused on intellectual property management, contract analysis, and enterprise productivity. Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver scalable applications using React, React Native, Python, and Django while ensuring high-quality code and exceptional user experiences.
achievements: Developed key modules for MikeIPSuite, a comprehensive intellectual property management platform used by legal professionals
Implemented robust features using React, Redux, Python, and Django technologies
Built intuitive and responsive user interfaces using Ant Design, SASS, and LESS
Collaborated with product managers, designers, and stakeholders to deliver projects on schedule
Contributed to MikeDocuSieve, an AI-powered contract drafting and document review solution
Enhanced Microsoft Word and Excel plugins using React Office Add-ins for document management workflows
Maintained high document review and analysis standards to meet client requirements
Developed and maintained MikeIris Mobile App, the administrative support platform for the IPSuite ecosystem
Built cross-platform mobile applications using React Native integrated with Django backend services
Ensured application scalability, performance, and operational consistency across platforms

description: Contributed to the development of enterprise web applications in the GST compliance and retail supply chain domains. Built responsive and interactive user interfaces using React and Redux while collaborating with backend teams to deliver scalable business solutions.
achievements: Developed responsive and user-friendly interfaces for EaseMyGST, a GST compliance and invoice management platform
Built dynamic web components using React.js and Redux for efficient state management
Integrated front-end applications with backend services and APIs
Implemented modern UI designs using HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript
Contributed to Supplymint's Open-to-Buy (OTB) retail planning and inventory management platform
Collaborated with senior developers and cross-functional teams to deliver features on schedule
Improved user experience and application responsiveness across devices and browsers
Gained hands-on experience in enterprise-scale React application development
